name: HRA_TMPL_PERIODS_VL
query: SELECT TP.TMPL_PERIOD_ID, TP.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, TP.TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID, TPTL.CUSTOMARY_NAME, TPTL.SHORT_NAME, TP.NOMINAL_FROM_DATE, TP.NOMINAL_TO_DATE, TP.AVAILABLE_TO_USE, TP.REVIEW_PERIOD_ID, TP.LOCK_MGR_SHARE_FOR_CALIB_FLAG, TP.GOAL_ALGORITHM_TYPE_CODE , TP.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TP.CREATED_BY, TP.CREATION_DATE, TP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, TP.MODULE_ID FROM HRA_TMPL_PERIODS_B TP, HRA_TMPL_PERIODS_TL TPTL WHERE TP.TMPL_PERIOD_ID = TPTL.TMPL_PERIOD_ID AND TP.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = TPTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND TPTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
